Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Eliadel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Eliadel is a name Grandmaster Naraka uses for Alin.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Alin is referred to as Eliadel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Eliadel trusts Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Eliadel arrived after Simon and Malachi's supposed fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Eliadel has black chain marks on his arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Eliadel's arm marks can turn from black to a bright, flaring white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Endross intends to bring Eliadel Simon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Eliadel is a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Grandmaster Naraka addresses Alin as Eliadel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Eliadel has fulfilled his role in prophecy by confronting King Zakareth.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Eliadel is with Grandmaster Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Eliadel is also known as Alin, son of Torin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Eliadel is also referred to as Elysia or the King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Eliadel has silver eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Eliadel killed the king of the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Eliadel is described as a good man at heart.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
